tweets.text:
To the victims of illegal alien crime and their families: we hear you and we see you.

The VOICE office was created during the first Trump Administration—only for the Biden Administration to shutter its doors and leave victims of alien crime without access to many key support services and resources.

Over the past year, the VOICE office fielded nearly 900 calls from victims, family members and advocates seeking information and assistance.

card.description: The U.S. Coast Guard Cutter Escanaba seized more than $33 million worth of cocaine during a routine patrol in the Eastern Pacific Ocean on Easter Sunday.
card.name: summary_large_image
card.title: EXCLUSIVE: Coast Guard Seizes More Than $33,000,000 Worth Of Cocaine In Single Drug Bust

tweets.text:
Keeping Americans SAFE.

On Easter Sunday, the @USCG Cutter Escanaba seized more than 4,510 pounds of cocaine worth $33.9 MILLION during a routine patrol in the Eastern Pacific Ocean.

Thank you to these heroes for saving American lives by keeping these deadly drugs out of our communities and off our streets.

https://t.co/3s8nwbYR3j
